---
name: Research question
about: Raise a theoretical or methodological question about the framework or a paper
title: "[RESEARCH] "
labels: research, discussion
assignees: ''
---

## Question

(What's the question you are asking the project?)

## Affected area

- [ ] Formal framework C (axioms DR-0..DR-4, Conformance Criterion)
- [ ] Profiles P_min / P_equ / P_max
- [ ] Pre-registered hypotheses H1-H4
- [ ] Statistical analysis plan (tests, corrections)
- [ ] Specific substrate (kiki_oniric, micro-kiki, etc.)
- [ ] Paper 1 (Nature HB formal)
- [ ] Paper 2 (NeurIPS empirical)
- [ ] Other — describe :

## Background / prior art

(Which existing work does this question intersect with? Cite if possible.)

## Expected resolution

- [ ] Answerable via the current repository / spec
- [ ] Requires an OSF amendment (cycle 2+)
- [ ] Requires an external expert review
- [ ] Exploratory only — not blocking any gate

## Preregistration impact

If the question implies changing the pre-registered analysis plan
or hypotheses, please flag it explicitly here and link to the
relevant section of `docs/osf-preregistration-draft.md`.
